note: Discovered-but-not-yet-implemented methods. The daily job auto-implements MOCK-feasible on-core ones (max 2/run); entries here need GPU/RL/finetuning/large-data, are off-core (RAG/QA/characterisation), overlap an existing method, or were left for a later run. They wait for /impl-approve or a dedicated effort.

candidates.name: Agentic-KGR (multi-agent RL co-evolutionary KG)

paper.title: Agentic-KGR: Co-evolutionary Knowledge Graph Construction through Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning

est_difficulty.rationale: core is multi-agent reinforcement learning + learnable prompt compression; not faithfully reproducible as a deterministic MOCK without RL/GPU

candidates.reason_deferred: RL/GPU core (like sac-kg) — needs dedicated effort, not auto-implementable

candidates.name: AGRAG (graph-based RAG; min-cost-max-influence subgraph)

paper.title: AGRAG: Advanced Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LLMs

est_difficulty.rationale: primarily a RAG RETRIEVAL method (subgraph optimization for answering), not ontology construction

candidates.reason_deferred: off-core: retrieval/QA over a graph rather than constructing an ontology

candidates.name: Wikontic (Wikidata-aligned, ontology-aware KG; qualifiers + type/relation constraints + alias-aware dedup)

paper.title: Wikontic: Constructing Wikidata-Aligned, Ontology-Aware Knowledge Graphs with Large Language Models

est_difficulty.rationale: multi-stage (qualified triplet extraction -> Wikidata type/relation constraint enforcement -> alias-aware normalization/dedup); MOCK-feasible, code public; partial overlap with ontology-grounded-wikidata but distinct (qualifiers + dedup + MINE)

candidates.reason_deferred: strong on-core MOCK-feasible candidate but per-run cap is 2 (socratickg + atom-tkg taken this run); good pick for next run / /impl-approve

candidates.name: Iterative LLM methodology for Ontological Knowledge Bases (vehicle-sales case study)

paper.title: Development of Ontological Knowledge Bases by Leveraging Large Language Models

est_difficulty.rationale: structured iterative knowledge-acquisition + artifact generation + refinement cycle; MOCK-feasible, no GPU

candidates.reason_deferred: on-core MOCK-feasible; left for a later run (2/run cap)

candidates.name: LLM-as-external-ontological-memory (entity/relation extract -> SHACL/OWL validate -> generation-verification-correction)

paper.title: Automatic Ontology Construction Using LLMs as an External Layer of Memory, Verification, and Planning for Hybrid Intelligent Systems

est_difficulty.rationale: construction pipeline (NER+RE+normalize+triples) gated by SHACL/OWL validation; MOCK-feasible but validation layer adds stages; partly framed as RAG-memory

candidates.reason_deferred: on-core but heavier (SHACL validation); later run

candidates.name: OntoKG (ontology-oriented, intrinsic-relational property routing over Wikidata dump)

paper.title: OntoKG: Ontology-Oriented Knowledge Graph Construction with Intrinsic-Relational Routing

est_difficulty.rationale: operates on the full Jan-2026 Wikidata dump (~100M items), rule-based cleaning to 34.6M core; needs_large_data dominates

candidates.reason_deferred: needs large-data (100M-item Wikidata dump); not MOCK-faithful without it

candidates.name: AutoPKG (multi-agent dynamic product-attribute KG; KGD centralized writer)

paper.title: AutoPKG: An Automated Framework for Dynamic E-commerce Product-Attribute Knowledge Graph Construction

est_difficulty.rationale: multi-agent (Type Induction / Key Discovery / Value Extraction / KGD writer); MOCK-feasible, but multimodal and overlaps peshevski-product-kg domain

candidates.reason_deferred: overlaps existing product-KG method (peshevski-product-kg); distinct KGD gatekeeper angle could justify later

candidates.name: LEC-KG (LLM + KG-embedding collaborative, bidirectional refinement)

paper.title: LEC-KG: An LLM-Embedding Collaborative Framework for Domain-Specific Knowledge Graph Construction

est_difficulty.rationale: core depends on trained Knowledge-Graph-Embedding structural feedback loop; KGE training pulls toward GPU/data, not purely MOCK

candidates.reason_deferred: KGE structural-reasoning loop needs embedding training; not MOCK-faithful

candidates.name: CompCQ (cross-domain characterisation of LLM-generated competency questions)

paper.title: Characterising LLM-Generated Competency Questions: a Cross-Domain Empirical Study using Open and Closed Models

est_difficulty.rationale: MOCK-feasible but it is an analysis/profiling framework for CQs (readability/complexity/diversity), not an ontology-construction pipeline

candidates.reason_deferred: off-core: characterises CQs, does not construct an ontology/graph

candidates.name: ARK / SAIL (autoregressive & latent generative KG models)

paper.title: Autoregressive Models for Knowledge Graph Generation (ARK / SAIL)

est_difficulty.rationale: trained autoregressive/variational generative models over triple sequences; requires training + GPU

candidates.name: HGNet / Z-NERD (foundation model for hierarchical scientific KG)

paper.title: HGNet: Scalable Foundation Model for Automated Knowledge Graph Generation from Scientific Literature

est_difficulty.rationale: custom attention + differentiable hierarchy losses; trained foundation model, GPU-bound

candidates.reason_deferred: trained foundation model with custom losses (GPU); not MOCK-faithful

candidates.name: TRACE-KG (text-driven schema, context-enriched KG with qualifiers + traceability)

paper.title: Beyond Predefined Schemas: TRACE-KG for Context-Enriched Knowledge Graphs from Complex Documents

est_difficulty.rationale: text-driven schema induction (no predefined ontology) + conditional qualifiers on relations + full source traceability; MOCK-feasible deterministic, no GPU/finetuning. 'multimodal' framing in paper but core text path implementable as MOCK.

candidates.reason_deferred: newly discovered 2026-06-20 daily search; selected for auto-implementation this run
